institution.name: The University of Texas Medical Branch at Galveston

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 20% at The University of Texas Medical Branch at Galveston vs the 2018–2022 baseline (559 vs 701).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at The University of Texas Medical Branch at Galveston fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (672 → 545).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at The University of Texas Medical Branch at Galveston rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($11.0k → $12.5k).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at The University of Texas Medical Branch at Galveston are 71% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($93.0k vs $54.5k).
